headline: AI Music and Audio Generation: Suno, Udio, and MusicLM
description: AI music generation has reached production quality: Suno v5 produces professional-grade tracks from text prompts, Udio excels at vocal authenticity, and MusicLM established the text-to-music paradigm. The technology is transforming music creation, advertising, and gaming audio.

citation.name: Suno v5: The World's Best Music Model
